member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Extensions.OutlineExtensions.GetSeoPath(VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.IHasOutlines,VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Core.Model.Store,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns SEO path if all outline items of the first outline for the store catalog have SEO keywords, otherwise returns default value. Path: GrandParentCategory/ParentCategory/ProductCategory/Product

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Extensions.OutlineExtensions.GetSeoPath(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.Outline},VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Core.Model.Store,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns SEO path if all outline items of the first outline for the store catalog have SEO keywords, otherwise returns default value. Path: GrandParentCategory/ParentCategory/ProductCategory/Product

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Extensions.OutlineExtensions.GetSeoPath(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.OutlineItem},VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Core.Model.Store,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns SEO path if all outline items have SEO keywords, otherwise returns default value. Path: GrandParentCategory/ParentCategory/ProductCategory/Product

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Extensions.OutlineExtensions.GetSeoPath(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.OutlineItem},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns SEO path if all outline items have SEO keywords, otherwise returns default value. Path: GrandParentCategory/ParentCategory/ProductCategory/Product

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Extensions.OutlineExtensions.GetSeoPaths(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.Outline},VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Core.Model.Store,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns all SEO paths for all outlines

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Extensions.OutlineExtensions.GetOutlinePath(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.Outline},System.String)
member.summary: Returns the path for a first outline with the given catalog: CategoryId/CategoryId2.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.AssetBase
member.summary: Base class for assets.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.AssetBase.TypeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the asset type identifier.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.AssetBase.Group
member.summary: Gets or sets the asset group name.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.AssetBase.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the asset name.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.AssetBase.LanguageCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the asset language.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.AssetBase.IsInherited
member.summary: System flag used to mark that object was inherited from other

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogLanguage.Priority
member.summary: Lowest number wins

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.ProductType
member.summary: The type of product. Can be "Physical", "Digital", etc.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Code
member.summary: The Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) code for the product.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.ManufacturerPartNumber
member.summary: A manufacturer part number (MPN) is a unique alphanumeric code assigned by a manufacturer to identify a specific product or component. It is used primarily for part tracking in inventory management, supply chain operations, and ordering purposes.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Gtin
member.summary: The Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) for the product. This can include UPC (in North America), EAN (in Europe), JAN (in Japan), and ISBN (for books).

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Name
member.summary: The name of the product.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.CatalogId
member.summary: The ID of the catalog to which this product belongs.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Catalog
member.summary: The catalog to which this product belongs.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.CategoryId
member.summary: The ID of the category to which this product belongs.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Outline
member.summary: Product outline in physical catalog (all parent categories ids concatenated. E.g. (1/21/344))

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Path
member.summary: Product path in physical catalog (all parent categories names concatenated. E.g. (parent1/parent2))

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.MainProductId
member.summary: The ID of the main product associated with this product variation.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.MainProduct
member.summary: The main product associated with this product variation.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.IsActive
member.summary: Specifies whether the product is currently visible on the store for customers to view and purchase. If set to false, the product is currently sold out.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.IsBuyable
member.summary: Specifies whether the product is currently visible on the store for customers to view and purchase. If set to false, the product is currently ouf of stock.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.TrackInventory
member.summary: Indicates whether the inventory service is tracking the availability of this product. If set to false, the product is considered in stock without any inventory limitations.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.IndexingDate
member.summary: The date and time when the product was last indexed for search.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.MaxQuantity
member.summary: The maximum quantity of the product that can be purchased in a single order. A value of 0 indicates that there are no limitations on the maximum quantity.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.MinQuantity
member.summary: The minimum quantity of the product that must be purchased in a single order. A value of 0 indicates that there are no limitations on the minimum quantity.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.PackSize
member.summary: Defines the number of items in a package. Quantity step for your product's. Default value is 1.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.StartDate
member.summary: First listed date and time. If you do not specify an end date, the product will be active until you deactivate it.If you do not specify an end date, the product will be active until you deactivate it.If you do not specify a start date, the product will become active immediately once you save it.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.EndDate
member.summary: Listing expires on the specific date and time. If you do not specify an end date, the product will be active until you deactivate it.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.PackageType
member.summary: The type of package for this product, which determines the product's specific dimensions.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.WeightUnit
member.summary: The unit of measurement for the product's weight.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Weight
member.summary: The weight of the product, in the unit specified by the WeightUnit property.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.MeasureUnit
member.summary: The unit of measurement for the product's height, length, and width.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Height
member.summary: The height of the product, in the unit specified by the MeasureUnit property.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Length
member.summary: The length of the product, in the unit specified by the MeasureUnit property.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Width
member.summary: The width of the product, in the unit specified by the MeasureUnit property.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.MaxNumberOfDownload
member.summary: The maximum number of times the product can be downloaded. A value of 0 indicates no limit.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.DownloadExpiration
member.summary: The date and time when the download link or access to the product will expire.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.DownloadType
member.summary: The type of product download. Valid values include: "Standard Product", "Software", and "Music".

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.HasUserAgreement
member.summary: Indicates whether the product requires the user to agree to any terms or conditions before downloading.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.ShippingType
member.summary: Specifies the type of shipping option available for the product.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.TaxType
member.summary: Specifies the type of tax applied to the product.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Vendor
member.summary: ID of the vendor associated with the product.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.Priority
member.summary: Indicates the position of the product in the catalog for ordering purposes.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.OuterId
member.summary: An external identifier for the product that can be used for integration with external systems.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.ImgSrc
member.summary: Gets the default image for the product.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.SeoObjectType
member.summary: Each descendant type should override this property to use other object type for seo records

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CatalogProduct.IsInherited
member.summary: System flag used to mark that object was inherited from other

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Category.Outline
member.summary: Category outline in physical catalog (all parent categories ids concatenated. E.g. (1/21/344))

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Category.Path
member.summary: Category path in physical catalog (all parent categories names concatenated. E.g. (parent1/parent2))

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Category.ImgSrc
member.summary: Gets the default image

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Category.IsInherited
member.summary: System flag used to mark that object was inherited from other

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Category.ReduceDetails(System.String)
member.summary: Reduce Category details

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink.EntryId
member.summary: Entry identifier which this link belongs to

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink.ListEntryType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the list entry. E.g. "product", "category"
member.value: The type of the list entry.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink.Priority
member.summary: Product order position in virtual catalog

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink.TargetId
member.summary: Gets the Id of either target Catetory or Catalog

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of either target Catetory or Catalog

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Export.TabularProduct.MaxNumberOfDownload
member.summary: re-downloads limit

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Export.TabularProduct.DownloadType
member.summary: DownloadType: {Standard Product, Software, Music}

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Export.TabularProduct.Priority
member.summary: Product order position in catalog

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.ICopyable
member.summary: This interface is used for types which support copy operation. Copy is very similar to clone operations, but it in additional this operation may reset the primary keys for copying objects

member.summary: Only simple product information and properties without meta information

member.summary: Represents move list entries command

member.summary: Category ListEntry record.

member.summary: Base class for all entries used in catalog categories browsing.

member.summary: Gets or sets the type. E.g. "product", "category"

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.ListEntry.ListEntryBase.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this entry is active.

member.summary: Uses ids for oultines.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.OutlinePart.IOutlinePartResolver
member.summary: Resolves an outline part for an entity. Abstraction allows us to switch behavior e.g. use codes instead of ids.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.ProductAssociation.Type
member.summary: Association type (Accessories, Up-Sales, Cross-Sales, Related etc)

member.summary: Is a primary key of associating object

member.summary: Each link element can have an associated object like Product, Category, etc. Is a primary key of associated object

member.summary: Associated object type : 'product', 'category' etc

member.summary: Associated object

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.ProductAssociation.AssociatedObjectName
member.summary: Display name for associated object

member.summary: Associated object image URL

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether user can change property value.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.IsManageable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether user can change property metadata or remove this property.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.IsNew
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this instance is new. A new property should be created on server site instead of trying to update it.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.CatalogId
member.summary: Gets or sets the catalog id that this product belongs to.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.CategoryId
member.summary: Gets or sets the category id that this product belongs to.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.Hidden
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this is hidden.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Property.IsSuitableForValue(VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.PropertyValue)
member.summary: Because we not have a direct link between prop values and properties we should find property value meta information by comparing key properties like name and value type.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.PropertyValidationRequest
member.summary: Property name validation data

member.summary: Represents property validation rules definition

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.PropertyValidationRule.IsUnique
member.summary: Uniquie value flag constrain

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.PropertyValidationRule.CharCountMin
member.summary: Down chars count border or null if no defined

member.summary: Upper chars count border or null if no defined

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.PropertyValidationRule.RegExp
member.summary: Custom regular expression

member.summary: Exclude a specified product type from the search

member.summary: Search within variations of specified main product

member.summary: Search in all children categories for specified catalog or categories

member.summary: Also search in variations

member.summary: Parent category id

member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the aggregation type

member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the aggregation field

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Aggregation.TermValuesSortingType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of "Attribute" aggregation type value sorting (if the aggregation was resolved via browse filters)

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Aggregation.Labels
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of the aggregation labels

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Aggregation.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of the aggregation items

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Aggregation.Statistics
member.summary: Statistics for range aggregations, such as "PriceRange" or "Range".

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the aggregation item value

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.Count
member.summary: Gets or sets the aggregation item count

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.IsApplied
member.summary: Gets or sets the flag for aggregation item is applied

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.Labels
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of the aggregation item labels

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.RequestedLowerBound
member.summary: Gets or sets the request lower bound for range aggregation value

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.RequestedUpperBound
member.summary: Gets or sets the request lower bound for range aggregation value

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.IncludeLower
member.summary: Is lower bound for range included

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.AggregationItem.IncludeUpper
member.summary: Is upper bound for range included

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.Outline
member.summary: CategoryId1/CategoryId2, no catalog should be included in the outline

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.Outlines
member.summary: CategoryId1/CategoryId2, no catalog should be included in the outline

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.Terms
member.summary: Term format: name:value1,value2

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.UserGroups
member.summary: Assigned groups for current user. Data format: user_groups:value1,value2

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.IsFuzzySearch
member.summary: Enable fuzzy search, i.e. allow to search color:white even if color:wihte actually passed to criteria

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.RawQuery
member.summary: Gets or sets the search provider specific raw search query; all other search criteria will be ignored

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.CatalogIndexedSearchCriteria.IncludeFields
member.summary: Allows to retrieve only a specific set of fields in the result hits

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.ProductType
member.summary: Physical, Digital, etc.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.ClassTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the class types.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.WithHidden
member.summary: Specifies if we search for hidden products.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.SearchInVariations
member.summary: Include product variations in result

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.StartDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the start date. The date must be in UTC format as that is format indexes are stored in.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.StartDateFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the start date from filter. Used for filtering new products. The date must be in UTC format as that is format indexes are stored in.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.EndDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the end date. The date must be in UTC format as that is format indexes are stored in.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.CertainDate
member.summary: Defines the date to be used for filtering products. The date must be in UTC format as that is format indexes are stored in.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.IncludeAggregations
member.summary: Gets or sets a "white" list of aggregation keys that identify preconfigured aggregations, which SHOULD be calculated and returned with the search result.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.ExcludeAggregations
member.summary: Gets or sets a "black" list of aggregation keys that identify preconfigured aggregations, which SHOULD NOT be calculated and returned with the search result.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.GeoDistanceFilter
member.summary: Geo distance filter

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductIndexedSearchCriteria.SortInfos
member.summary: Override base SortInfo property to support GeoSortInfo sorting types

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Indexed.ProductSuggestionRequest.CatalogId
member.summary: Filter the suggestion results by a catalog ID

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Indexed.ProductSuggestionRequest.Query
member.summary: A word, phrase, or text fragment which will be used to make suggestions

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.Indexed.ProductSuggestionRequest.Size
member.summary: Number of suggestions to return

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.SearchResult.Products
member.summary: Type used in search result and represent properties search result aggregation

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.SearchResult.Aggregations
member.summary: Represent aggregations for product properties

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ListEntrySearchResult.ListEntries
member.summary: Gets or sets the list entries.

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductSearchCriteria.MainProductId
member.summary: Search within variations of specified main product

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductSearchCriteria.SearchInVariations
member.summary: Include product variations in result

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductSearchCriteria.ProductTypes
member.summary: Search product with specified types

member.name: P:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.Search.ProductSearchCriteria.PropertyName
member.summary: Find product having property with specified property name

member.summary: Search criteria used for search property dictionary items

member.summary: Represents the path from the catalog to one of the child objects (product or category): catalog/parent-category1/.../parent-categoryN/object

member.summary: Outline parts

member.summary: Returns aggregations that match the specified search criteria

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Serialization.ProductJsonSerializer
member.summary: Provides JSON serialization and deserialization for catalog objects (products, categories, etc.) with settings optimized for compact storage (e.g. product snapshots in orders).

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Serialization.ProductJsonSerializer.DeserializePolymorphic``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes JSON to the correct polymorphic type using .

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Services.IOutlineService
member.summary: Constructs outlines for objects

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Services.IOutlineService.FillOutlinesForObjects(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Outlines.IHasOutlines},System.String)
member.summary: Constructs single physical and/or multiple virtual outlines for given objects. Outline is the path from the catalog to one of the child objects (product or category): catalog/parent-category1/.../parent-categoryN/object
member.param: Objects for which outlines should be constructed.
If catalogId is not null then only outlines starting with this catalog will be constructed. If catalogId is null then all possible outlines will be constructed.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Services.IPropertyDictionaryItemService
member.summary: The abstraction represent the CRUD operations for property dictionary items

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Services.IVideoProvider
member.summary: Provides video metadata from external video hosting platforms.
